reason: Verify the release trust chain remains consistent across config, workflow, secret inputs, bundle preparation, and artifact evidence.
Check that signing and notarization validation has one owner per contract and no drift-prone duplicate lists.
Validate the implementation against the audited gaps and updater trust-root constraints.
Verify canonical URLs, legacy-origin residue, and redirect-versus-proxy rollout constraints across every product surface.
Verify the executable product-origin contract, endpoint ownership, compatibility matrix, and required assertions.
